subject: A massive stepped pyramid or ziggurat rising from a dark, flat, mist-covered wasteland, with glowing amber light blazing from horizontal openings across its facade
description: A wide landscape scene dominated by a large stepped pyramid or ziggurat standing alone on a desolate, flat terrain. The structure has dark vertical pillar-like columns running down its face and a vivid band of warm amber-gold interior light blazing across a horizontal opening near its middle, as if fire or intense illumination burns within. The surrounding terrain is barren — shallow reflective water or wet ground in the midground, low mist clinging near the base of the structure, broken rock in the extreme foreground. The sky is deep indigo and dark storm-grey. No figures are present. The mood is ominous, ancient, and lonely — a monument standing untouched in a blighted land.
foreground: dark barren ground, broken rock, shallow reflective water, low mist
emotion: no figures; the scene conveys isolation and foreboding through composition
